finding: The `encoding-touched-guard` skill tells agents to run `npm run check:encoding:touched`, but this framework repo does not define that npm script, so the recommended preflight fails before checking any touched files.
expectedBehavior: Repo-local encoding guidance should point to an existing validator or the package should add the documented script; agents should not need to invent a fallback for BOM/U+FFFD checks.
evidenceOrRepro: Fixed by adding `scripts/check-encoding-touched.ts`, `check:encoding:touched`, and `check:encoding:staged`. The wrapper delegates the actual scan to `node atm.mjs guard encoding --files ... --json`, supports explicit `--files`, includes untracked text files in touched mode, and keeps staged mode index-only. Validation: `npm run check:encoding:touched -- --files package.json`, `npm run check:encoding:touched`, `npm run check:encoding:staged`, and `npm run validate:script-parity`.
followUp: Keep the script-parity assertion that both npm scripts remain wired to the wrapper; future encoding skill changes should prefer this canonical package script instead of ad hoc PowerShell fallbacks.
